productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Pink Black Sling Bag
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this pink sling bag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining for durability and comfortPadded with 100% polyethylene for enhanced comfort and durabilityOne inner zipped pocket and two smaller pockets to stash away essentialsTwo zippered pockets on the front to store other essentialsSingle adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulderBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeBrand name printed on the front in large letteringBrand tab appliqued on the sideCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
